entry.title: Taylor Swift defeats Florida poet's plagiarism lawsuit
Supreme Court ruling may wipe out Democrats' cash advantage in Senate battlegrounds
Maine's Democratic Party calls for Platner to drop out of race
US service sector growth dips in June; employment rebounds after months of contraction
US makes available $281 mln in grants for addiction and mental health programs
US seizes nearly 400 websites that were illegally streaming World Cup, DOJ says
entry.summary: The Reuters Inside Track newsletter is your essential guide during the World Cup. Sign up here. Reporting by Jasper Ward in Washington, Editing by Rosalba O''Brien Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab Jasper Ward is a breaking news reporter in Washington. She primarily covers national affairs and U.S. politics. Jasper was previously based in The Bahamas where she covered the collapse of FTX and the subsequent arrest of its founder Sam Bankman-Fried. She was a part of the Reuters team that won the Gerald Loeb Award for breaking news for its FTX coverage.

entry.title: Supreme Court expands Second Amendment rights, eyes more gun cases

entry.title: Adani prosecutors must justify dropping criminal case, US judge rules
entry.summary: The Reuters Daily Briefing newsletter provides all the news you need to start your day. Sign up here. Reporting by Luc Cohen in New York, Editing by Franklin Paul, Rod Nickel and Cynthia Osterman Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab Reports on the New York federal courts. Previously worked as a correspondent in Venezuela and Argentina.

entry.title: Surge in imports drives US goods trade deficit to 14-month high in May
entry.summary: Get a daily digest of breaking business news straight to your inbox with the Reuters Business newsletter. Sign up here. Reporting by Lucia Mutikani; Editing by Andrea Ricci and Paul Simao Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab

entry.title: US court rejects EPA bid to ease regulations for coal-fired power plants
entry.summary: Jumpstart your morning with the latest legal news delivered straight to your inbox from The Daily Docket newsletter. Sign up here. Reporting by David Shepardson and Valerie Volcovici; Editing by Sanjeev Miglani and Edwina Gibbs Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab Valerie Volcovici covers U.S. climate and energy policy from Washington, DC. She is focused on climate and environmental regulations at federal agencies and in Congress and how the energy transition is transforming the United States. Other areas of coverage include her award-winning reporting plastic pollution and the ins and outs of global climate diplomacy and United Nations climate negotiations.

entry.title: Three firefighters killed, 2 injured in Snyder wildfire on Utah-Colorado border
Congressional panel investigating Epstein subpoenas Leon Black
entry.summary: The Reuters Daily Briefing newsletter provides all the news you need to start your day. Sign up here. Reporting by Nolan D. McCaskill; Editing by Andy Sullivan and Edmund Klamann Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab Nolan D. McCaskill reports on American politics, including the U.S. Congress. He previously covered Texas politics at The Dallas Morning News and national politics at Politico and the Los Angeles Times. He is a graduate of Florida A&M University and a member of the National Association of Black Journalists. Reach him at .

He can be reached at .

entry.title: Watchdog faults Secret Service for missing 102 radio calls during 2024 Trump shooting
entry.summary: Jumpstart your morning with the latest legal news delivered straight to your inbox from The Daily Docket newsletter. Sign up here. Reporting by Jasper Ward in Washington; editing by Ross Colvin, Donna Bryson and Rod Nickel Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles. , opens new tab Jasper Ward is a breaking news reporter in Washington. She primarily covers national affairs and U.S. politics. Jasper was previously based in The Bahamas where she covered the collapse of FTX and the subsequent arrest of its founder Sam Bankman-Fried. She was a part of the Reuters team that won the Gerald Loeb Award for breaking news for its FTX coverage.
